Section 1  
I need to write a Python function that counts the number of occurrences of a specific word in a given text, ignoring case sensitivity. The function should return an integer representing how many times the specified word appears in the text.

Section 2  
The function will take two inputs: `text` (a string) and `word` (a string). The function will process the text to count the occurrences of the word, ignoring case. To achieve this, I will convert both the text and the word to lowercase (or uppercase) to ensure case insensitivity.

Section 3  
I will use the `count` method of strings in Python, but I will first convert both the text and the word to lowercase (or uppercase) to ensure case insensitivity. Then, I will use the `count` method to find the number of times the word appears in the text.

Section 4  
Finally, I will return the count as an integer. The function will handle edge cases, such as the word not being present in the text, and will return 0 in such cases.

P.S.: Your response must have 4 sections.
